tool.name: adb_exec
tool.description: Execute a raw adb command via the configured HTTP bridge endpoint.

parameter.name: cmd
parameter.description: Raw adb command without the leading "adb". Examples: "devices", "shell input tap 500 1000", "shell input keyevent 3", "exec-out screencap -p".

returns.description: Raw command output returned by the HTTP bridge.

tool.notes: - Bridge URL must be configured with SONDRA_ADB_URL. - For `exec-out screencap -p`, binary output is saved to SONDRA_ADB_SCREENSHOT_PATH (default: /workspace/adb_screencap.png).
